query: SELECT id, status, duration, contactName, contactPhone, teamMemberName, callType, classification, callSource, created_at, updated_at, tenant_id FROM calls WHERE status NOT IN ('completed', 'skipped', 'failed') ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 10;
